title: The High Court (Amendment) Act (2011)

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the High Court (Amendment) Short title
sections.body:
This Act may be cited as the High Court (Amendment) Short title
Act, 2011, and shall be read as one with the High Court Act, in this
Act referred to as the principal Act. Cap. 27
5 2. The principal Act is amended by the deletion of section Repeal and
replacement
ten and the substitution therefor of the following:
of section 10

sections.title: (1) The jurisdiction vested in the Court shall, as regards Practice and
sections.body:
(1) The jurisdiction vested in the Court shall, as regards Practice and
procedure
practice and procedure, be exercised in the manner provided
by this Act, the Criminal Procedure Code, the Matrimonial Cap. 88
Act No. 20
10 Causes Act, 2007, or any other written law, or by such rules,
of 2007
orders or directions of the Court as may be made under this
Act, the Criminal Procedure Code, the Matrimonial Causes Cap. 88
Act, 2007, or such written law, and in default thereof in Act No. 20
of 2007
substantial conformity with the Supreme Court Practice, 1999
15 (White Book) of England and subject to subsection (2), the
law and practice applicable in England in the High Court of
Justice up to 31st December, 1999.
(2) The Civil Court Practice, 1999 (Green Book) of
England and any civil court practice rules issued in England
20 after 31st December, 1999, shall not apply to Zambia.

sections.title: Section eleven of the principal Act is amended— Amendment
sections.body:
Section eleven of the principal Act is amended— Amendment
of section
(a) by the deletion of subsection (1); and 11
(b) by the renumbering of subsections (2), (3), (4) and (5) as
subsections (1), (2), (3) and (4), respectively.
N.A.B. 8, 2011
Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K2,000 each.
76
